message:
feat(lab): expand dual-run observable comparison to cover all semantic fields

The compare_observables() function was only checking a subset of the
available semantic fields, meaning dual-run verdicts could silently
pass when lab and live runtimes diverged on important dimensions like
surface identity, cancel reason class, panic class, region lifecycle
details, or obligation balance breakdowns.

New field comparisons added:
- compare_observables: surface_id, surface_contract_version
- compare_terminal_outcome: cancel_reason_class, panic_class
- compare_region_close: live_children, finalizers_pending
- compare_obligation_balance: reserved, committed, aborted

Tests added:
- compare_surface_identity_mismatch_fails
- compare_cancel_reason_class_mismatch_fails (+ panic_class)
- compare_region_close_children_and_finalizers_mismatch
- compare_obligation_balance_reserved_committed_aborted_mismatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
